title: Tech Programming and English Tutorials
author: Priya
content:
Android App Development Tutorials

▶

1. Novel Scholar App Tutorial

This is the novel app for those who have habit to read novels regularly. I have added different categories of novels in this app based on the interest of the reader and the novel ratings.All these novels have high star rating and of famous foreign and indian writers.You can read the novel , novel summary or just listen to these novels in audio format.I have included online dictionary to make search meanings.And have given a bottom tab to bookmark your important novel.

▶

2. Greetings App

This is an app which you can use in different different occassions to wish or greet somebody with good messages. You can greet someone with good thoughts or can wish somebody in different style.I have also added here rivetting jokes,quotes and slogans that are spoken by famous dignitaries or politicians. You can send greetings to someone as drawable or as normal text or by encrypted format as QR.Memory occupancy of this app in KB and you can cache some good thoughts or greetings in the app memory as well.

▶

3. Shlok Mantra App

This is the app for all the admirer of dieties. I have included here various shlok,arti, chalisa,mantra that are chanted during any pooja processing. You can read the mantras or just listen to it in audio format. You can also translate the language to Hindi or English . And can set your wallpaper image with the god/goddess image from within the app. I have added good animation in every page and covered most of the common spoken shloks.

▶

4. Instance Conversion App

this is the app to check for general conversion parameters like - currency,temperature, scale,weight,liquid volume.I also added feature to check your BMI , sensor based foot step counting and detecting,measurement of screen resolution. You can check the conversion details of the above parameters.All the values are calculated precisely with accuracy.

▶

5. Inventory Management App

This is the app to regulate your month budget by maintaing a record of all your expenses. This app will help you to save many pennies of your money by maintaining a proper inventory of all your expenditure. You can split the gross amount with other members you are adding in this app and also you can make payment online through upi or card via razorpay. Updation , deletion of 1 or multiple records from your inventory history list is possible and all the records will be maintained with proper date and time.

▶

6. Quiz App

This is the quiz app .Here i have added multiple quizzes of different technology based topic and languages. The quizzes are time based and needs to be completed within the time slot otherwise you will get popup as "Times Up" . The result score and status will be saved in the result history tab. And you can also view the result in graphical format using bar or pie chart. Screenshot is not allowed to take during the assessment. And you can also enable dark mode in the app.

▶

7. Notification App

This is a notification reminder app whenever you are running out of time or you can't understand where how your time is spending doing nothing than it's a good app for you that will notify you for all your activities on time by ringing an alarm. You can turn the alarm off/on using toggle on/off button and can also turned off all the alarms at once.

▶

8. AI Video App

This is AI eye detecting video player app.In this app, you can streamed youtube videos online from within the app in the normal mode and also you can watch the video in AI mode .In AI mode, if you are not watching the screen or your eyes are off than in that case video will get paused. It will only be played when your eyes are on and you are watching the screen.You can also filter your search item from the list , share the app link with another app/person view source code of all those apps and also to download the APK/ZIP files of the apps.

▶

9. JSON Parser App

This is the App that will give you data from API having response stored in the Json format.I used volley library for retrieving data through the API into our app. I have parsed all type of json request based on image,mp3,mp4, a normal web url for spotify,netflix,youtube.Also added quiz in the App.

PHP Web Development Tutorials

▶

1. Dictionary App Tutorial

This is the dictionary app here i have included 700 word meanings by adding meaning from json file to the database.You can also translate the meaning in literal sense to another language.And can also view the list of all 700 word meaning in the same screen by clicking on view icon.

▶

2. CV Maker App

This is the CV Builder app . After filling details on the form a dynamic pdf will be generated carrying all your details. You can download that pdf .There are also clickable links on the pdf with user's website detail .Clicking on that will redirect you to your website.This is a easy CV creator app through which you can build your CV in no time.

▶

3. Calculator App

This is the calculator app in which i have developed calculator app in 3 ways - Scientific Calculator [ Without OOP] Simple Calculator [Without OOP] Simple Calculator [ With OOP] Code is pretty simple and data of all your opeation will save in the database. By clicking on the view icon you can see all the past opeartions you have performed.

▶

4. Banking App

This is the banking app that will allow user to open their bank account ,make cash transaction , See their transaction history.And allows for admin of every bank to see their registered user details.I have added bank of all type for the user to choose from.

▶

5. ATM Cash Dispenser App

This is the atm cash dispenser app where i have added functionality to cash out your amount in denomination of 100 and 500 ruppee note.

▶

6. JSON Text Parsing App

With this app you can convert your data from text to Json format .You only have to provide the delimiter within the key value pair and between 2 pairs to make separation in key value format.

▶

7. PHP Basic App

In this tutorial i have performed all the PHP basic operations like - sorting,searching, averaging, factorial etc.

▶

8.Monthlies Tracker App

This is the app to calculate your month days .By entering your 1st period day you can get the list of all the consecutive months when your period due date will be for over the entire year.

▶

9. PHP Website

This is a website created using one of the known framework of PHP using codeigniter using all these videos combined together with other added functionalities.

Spring Web Development Tutorials

▶

1. api using jpa jsp h2 in-memory Database in Spring Boot

This is the code to insert form data into table named alien in h2 in-memory database . Jasper dependency is used to parse jsp file code and present a responsive view to the user through servlet.The user's entered data will be stored in the alien table of h2 database. We can fetch that stored data using the same view having a form. The stored records can also be retrieved by hitting the get api through postman or browser.

▶

2. get api response using jdbcTemplate with h2 in-memory database in spring boot

This is the API to store data into h2 in-memory database using jdbcTemplate with DatabaseInitialiser class. The jdbcTemplate will use the sql queries to store and retrieve data from the h2 database.

▶

3. Post get api response using ResponseEntity class in spring boot

This is the simple code to insert data using post api and fetch that data as json object using get api by hitting these api through postman. ResponseEntity class is use confugure the http code and message and give a more detailed and precise response in postman.

▶

4. Fetch stored h2 in-memory databse record using jpa repository in Spring Boot

This video is continuation of h2 in-memory database using jdbcTemplate . Please, watch it 1st to understand this code. In this code , we are using jpa repository that have some in-built method like - findbyId() , findAll() to fetch the data from the database. The data was stored using jdbcTemplate class 1st in h2 db and we are using this jparepository to fetch that data.

▶

5. To see get API response using postman in Spring Boot

This is the basic get api to see the response in output as json which was fed statically through code using List .The API response can be checked in browser or by hitting the rest endpoint through postman.

English Descriptors for body,hair and growth

▶

1. Praiseful words for compliments

Here r some glimpses of my video for giving compliments to someone on their looks and appearance, and some good praising words and sentences 1 can use for some lavish-looking objects. We generally stay behind when we have to give compliments to someone for something and use some cliche words which r so common. Here r some advanced words and sentences that can be used on praise for something or someone.

▶

2. Different body types, build, and figure

This video is about enlightening our viewers about different body types from short ,trim to fat ,fluffy. We all have different physique and personality and this is what differentiate us from others as fit,healthy or lame. This is my video where i categorised all such body types and figures . There r some modern ,advance ways with different body type.Also included many catchy phrases and idioms that 1 must know. Please , watch and like my video .

▶

3. Attention seeking Words

This video has many short phrases and catchy expressions for sensational news-making. to catch others' attention on u and to make certain remarks and short propositions to take others' attention on u. Here r some lists of classic flashpoints that 1 can use for effective communication in public. Watch it and use it in your public speaking, in making a news headline, or in general everyday conversation.

▶

4.Different Types of Clothing Fabric

This video contains a variety of clothing fabrics with soft textures and alluring designs. We all run after glitz and glamour and want to style our outfit beautifully, robbed in a soft, smoothy, showy outfit to turn all heads. Our comfort and look come at the top when we have to pick a dress that is easing to body and has a flexing charm. Here r list of all such varieties of fabrics - natural, synthetic, and different polished designs that 1 must know about.

▶

5. Health Related Words for Body

This is a video describing all types of body ailments, from a mild fever to an acute disease. Every one of us is engulfed with some body issues that could be a minor pain or a severe, life-threatening disease. Having awareness about different body issues, signs, and symptoms is very important to prevent them from happening. This video covers all the major illnesses that we must know about to contain them and develop an antibody against such bodily issues. Please, watch it and fight against all harmful pathogens that r putting our health at risk of slow collapse.

▶

6. Varieties in cement, clay, and other metallic and plastic goods

This video will tell you about different variations we have in the most basic types of metals and plastic wares we use in our household. To distinguish between 2 similar looking objects who r much distance apart when juxtaposing them together.I took some of these homely items to figure out their major key holdings and their physical composition. By watching this video u will get a good understanding in identifying your basic, daily use items and how worthy they are for your use.

▶

7. Different body gestures and postures

This video will showcase different gestures and postures of our walk and talk. Different types of walks, facial expressions, and our sitting position How restfully we sit or slouch, we must know all such body positions and walks. This video also contains different idiomatic expressions related to our body moves and facial expressions, which r some spoken sentences under general English speaking. Watch this video to know about varied expressions and body movement. U can also use these kinetic expressions in your daily English.

▶

8.Some admiring words for food and drinks

Food has a variety of tastes, and what is appealing to us, we keep them in our list of favourites. Now here r some words for your pantry of food items, which are your delish, and u can express them with some praiseful words. This video has a list of such words and idiomatic expressions which u can use for foods which r soothing for your tongue. Watch this video and do like and subscribe to my channel.

▶

9. Words and expression to describe beauty and look

Everyone wants to look good and to hear compliments on their beauty. Here r some magical words that can be used to define someone's look and beauty. In this video, there r many advanced words for fashion and beauty, and many idioms and phrasal verbs related to look and personality. These r some very commonly used expressions and short phrases to extol one's look and beauty. Use them and power up your diction by adding these advanced, modern words.

▶

10. Different shapes and textures of hair

We all have different shapes, sizes, and textures of our hair, and we style them differently - add bounce in hair, straighten up, or turn them into curls. This video will describe all such hair that we may have seen somewhere but can't name them. Now, next time whenever u go to a salon, remember these shapes and sizes to style your hair in the exact manner u wanted.

▶

11. Different words and idioms to express happiness and anger

Happiness and anger r phase of life that are inseparable. We see different occurrences of mood swings, joy, and happiness in our everyday life, and 1 must know the different ways we can show our fun and sadness. How to react and show visible expressions by speaking confidently and voicing your opinions and views on a certain situation. These words and expressions I talked about in the video can help an individual show a strong message of their happiness, desire, and sadness, apparently in a simpler and more nuanced way. And these r very common expressions that could be used in everyday conversation.

▶

12. Different types of Smiles

This video is about telling users why their smile matters. And what a smile tells about a person's behaviour. We laugh differently in different situations, and to make a distinction in our laughs and talk, this video is created to know how your smile means a lot. Now, any next time u smile, you can easily differentiate when and how to react to that and how to create a beautiful aura around u with your cheerful smile.

Spoken English Tutorials

▶

1. Subject + would rather / No sooner had + Subject + V3 sentence structure +phrasal verbs usecase

This video has sentence structure, some advanced phrasal verbs, a short image description, and a short story using the same sentence structure and phrasal verbs. Sentence structures - No sooner had + Subject + V3 + than + Clause Subject + would rather + Verb Subject + happened to + Verb Little did + Subject + know + Clause

▶

2. Hardly had + Subject sentence structure usecase

This video has sentence structure, some advanced phrasal verbs, a short image description, and a short story using the same sentence structure and phrasal verbs. Sentence structures - Hardly had + Subject + V3 + when + Clause Subject + had every reason to + Verb

▶

3. Advanced Sentence Structures Using Modals and auxiliary verbs

This video has sentence structure, some advanced phrasal verbs, a short image description, and a short story using the same sentence structure and phrasal verbs. Sentence structures - ------------------------------------------------- 1.Subject + could have + V3 2.Subject + should have + V3 3.Subject + might have + V3 -------------------------------------------------------- 1.Not only + auxiliary + subject + verb 2. Rarely had + subject + V3 3. So + adjective + auxiliary + subject 4. Had + subject + V3

▶

4. Had it not been for + noun / Scarcely had + subject + V3 sentence structure usecase

This video has sentence structure, some advanced phrasal verbs, a short image description, and a short story using the same sentence structure and phrasal verbs. Sentence structures - Scarcely had + subject + V3 + when… Had it not been for + noun… Subject + is said to have + V3 Much as + subject + verb… No matter how + adjective/adverb…

▶

5. Subject + was being / Subject + has/have/had been + V3 sentence structure ,conditional statements

This video has sentence structure, some advanced phrasal verbs, a short image description, and a short story using the same sentence structure and phrasal verbs. Sentence structures - Subject + has/have been + V3 Subject + was being + V3 Subject + had been + V3 Subject + will have been + V3 ___________________________________________ Had + subject + V3, subject + would have + V3 Were + subject + to + verb… If it had not been for + noun… Provided that…

▶

6. But for + noun / Had it not been for sentence structure usecase

This video has sentence structure, some advanced phrasal verbs, a short image description, and a short story using the same sentence structure and phrasal verbs. Sentence structures - Under no circumstances + auxiliary + subject + verb Not until + clause + auxiliary + subject + verb Only after + clause + auxiliary + subject + verb Had it not been for… On condition that… But for + noun…

Please like my video and subscribe to my channel

Frequently Asked Questions

What HR and managerial interview questions are covered on this page?

For HR and managerial questions u can check our homepage blogs which has around 100 such questions to help make u job-ready.This page includes spoken English improvement content, communication skill development resources, and technical programming tutorials for students and professionals.

Are these programming tutorials beginner friendly?

Yes. The tutorials are designed for beginners as well as intermediate learners who want to improve their practical understanding of Java, Spring Boot, Android, PHP, and related technologies.

How can spoken English tutorials help in interviews?

Strong communication skills and fluent spoken English improve confidence during HR interviews, managerial discussions, client interactions, and workplace communication.
